creator: rgl@ruilopes.com
text:
I want to relinquish all my ports.  So, please reset the following ports maintainer:

  devel/aap
  devel/agide
  devel/global
  devel/regexxer
  devel/ruby-rcov
  devel/rubygem-daemons
  devel/rubygem-gem_plugin
  devel/rubygem-tzinfo
  math/py-fpconst
  www/rubygem-mongrel
  www/rubygem-mongrel_cluster


It was a fun time interacting with FreeBSD and its great community!  see all some of these days!


  -- Rui Lopes
